posts.author: hbsfrance (Pierre)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

How can I import all of our information and the activity log of each of our elements to Zoho Analytics via API?
(Import Data l Zoho Analytics Help)

I don’t want to use Excel as it does not contain the history log of our leads (it’s important at what date what statuses were on since we use a VOIP solutions such as Aircall and Ringover, so this would help to know at how many calls and how much time spent a lead has changed its’ status, and so on)

I would appreciate your help ! Or, if you have a better solution in mind for the analytics part where I can put the calls and see the evolution with graphs, tell me, please.
